items.name_cn:
Genuine Grade
New Arrival🅰️🅰️ CE New Small HELOISE HOBO Shoulder Bag, Must-have Series! Rounded and smooth curved body, looks like a larger version of the familiar AVA at first glance ~ Celine really delivers when they make a move🫡 This large Hobo gives a very French lazy and casual vibe. Classic color combinations, stylish and chic, not easy to go out of style. Bag capacity can meet short business trips or daily commute, very practical!
Style No.: 117253
Color: Monogram
Dimensions: 23x17x21

items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
New Arrival🅰️🅰️ When talking about the 24 Fall/Winter show, you can't help but be drawn to the glossy items 👁️ Clean, elegant lines. Minimalist design with intersecting contours. If you can only choose one piece, it must be this TERENCE. The iconic TRIOMPHE logo element, gentle and elegant. Patent calfskin, unique luster and recognizability - A petite and fun shape, can be carried as a handbag or over the shoulder❇️
TRIOMPHE turnlock closure, 1 main compartment
1 interior flat pocket
1 adjustable leather handle
Style No.:118313
Color: Black
Size:21x5.5x11cm

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
New Arrival🅰️🅰️
Celine 23 Early Spring Lisa Style Mini ~besace
The real thing is so beautiful, retro and stylish, looks good with any outfit! The curved bottom and flap design make it look younger. Compared to the relatively mini style, the handle design is both playful and cute, a style you'll fall in love with at first glance, carrying it for photos is full of elegance. Can be worn crossbody or shoulder, or carried by hand!
Style: Retro, stylish, cute style~
Capacity: Large phone doesn't fit, can hold keys, tissues, compact powder, 💄
Model: 10K502 Mocha Brown (Pure steel hardware)
Size: 15.5-11.5-5 (with original packaging)

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
New in stock 🅰️🅰️ TILLY 〰️
CE 2024 Chinese New Year Limited Edition TILLY Handbag.
The latest rounded shoulder bag, continuing the tone of the CE CROQUE handbag. This minimalist style handbag is adorned with TRIOMPHE metal hardware. It can hold a phone, car keys, cosmetics, and other essentials. The capacity is sufficient. The bag shape is structured, with a zipper closure. It has 1 main compartment and 1 interior flat pocket. The shoulder strap is adjustable. Compared to the previous Tilly, this one is more retro and cute 😍!
Model No.: 115702
Color: Denim (with original packaging)
Dimensions: 22x13.5x4
